## Summary

First-paint, input-response, and the save-pipeline timing projection pass on the checked-in hot-path dashboard. Warm-start rows have missing observations, restore fidelity is still a provisional scenario seed, and the supportability scorecard has no measured diagnosis-latency pass yet; the packet therefore remains evidence_stale for release widening.

## Degrade Notes

- `ff.warm_start_to_first_paint`: The checked-in hot-path dashboard contains missing observations for both warm-start dashboard projections, so this packet cannot carry a fresh passing startup claim.
- `ff.vfs_save_conflict_handling`: The save-pipeline p95 projection passes, but that projection covers only timing. The full conflict-taxonomy and compare-before-write gate remains outside the checked-in hot-path dashboard output.
- `ff.restore_fidelity`: The restore-fidelity row is provisional and the hot-path gate reports the workspace restore metric as pending_scenario_seed.
- `support.alpha.diagnosis_latency_scorecard`: The alpha support scorecard covers the required scenario families, but its status is seeded_pending_measurement and no measured diagnosis pass is present yet.
